edges.description: Reduced ceramide degradation causes ceramide accumulation and neuronal injury.
edges.target: Ceramide Accumulation and Motor Neuron Degeneration

edges.description: Lower motor neuron degeneration produces the spinal muscular atrophy component of SMA-PME.
edges.source: Ceramide Accumulation and Motor Neuron Degeneration

edges.description: Anterior horn and lower motor neuron involvement produces progressive muscle weakness.
edges.source: Ceramide Accumulation and Motor Neuron Degeneration

edges.description: Cortical neuronal dysfunction produces myoclonic seizures.
edges.source: Ceramide Accumulation and Motor Neuron Degeneration

edges.description: Cortical neuronal dysfunction also produces generalized seizures in SMA-PME.
edges.source: Ceramide Accumulation and Motor Neuron Degeneration

edges.description: Progressive neuronal dysfunction manifests as drug-resistant myoclonic epilepsy in the SMA-PME spectrum.
edges.source: Ceramide Accumulation and Motor Neuron Degeneration

evidence.reference_title: Spinal Muscular Atrophy with Progressive Myoclonic Epilepsy (SMA-PME): three new cases and review of the mutational spectrum.

nodes.description: Biallelic ASAH1 variants reduce lysosomal acid ceramidase, the hydrolase that degrades ceramide; SMA-PME is allelic with Farber disease.

evidence.reference_title: Acid Ceramidase Deficiency: New Insights on SMA-PME Natural History, Biomarkers, and In Cell Enzyme Activity Assay.
evidence.snippet:
epilepsy (SMA-PME) due to acid ceramidase deficiency is a rare disorder, allelic
with Farber disease, resulting from recessive ASAH1 variants

nodes.description: Impaired ceramide degradation causes ceramide accumulation, driving lower motor neuron loss (spinal muscular atrophy) and cortical neuronal dysfunction (progressive myoclonic epilepsy).
nodes.id: Ceramide Accumulation and Motor Neuron Degeneration

evidence.reference_title: Spinal Muscular Atrophy with Progressive Myoclonic Epilepsy (SMA-PME): three new cases and review of the mutational spectrum.
evidence.snippet: myoclonic and generalized seizures with progressive neurological deterioration

nodes.description: Progressive drug-resistant myoclonic epilepsy is a core component of SMA-PME.
Generalized seizures accompany the myoclonic epilepsy.

evidence.reference_title: Spinal Muscular Atrophy with Progressive Myoclonic Epilepsy (SMA-PME): three new cases and review of the mutational spectrum.
evidence.snippet: myoclonic and generalized seizures with progressive neurological deterioration

nodes.description: Progressive muscle weakness from lower motor neuron loss.

evidence.snippet:
Patients present
in early childhood with muscle weakness due to anterior horn degeneration

nodes.description: Myoclonic seizures characterize the progressive myoclonic epilepsy component.

nodes.description: Lower motor neuron degeneration producing progressive proximal weakness (non-5q SMA).
